title: Elena Rybakina Wins a Tough Tennis Match in Miami
summary: Elena Rybakina is a tennis player who won Wimbledon in 2022. She played against Jessica Pegula in the Miami Open, which is a big tennis tournament. Rybakina lost the first set but fought back to win the match 2-6, 6-3, 6-4. This was her fifth win in a row against Pegula. Rybakina hit many aces, which are powerful serves that the opponent cannot return, and saved break points to help her win. She said it was hard playing Pegula because Pegula started well, but Rybakina stayed calm and turned the match around. Next, Rybakina will play Aryna Sabalenka in the semi-finals. Sabalenka is the world number one and beat Rybakina recently. The semi-finals are on Thursday, and other players like Coco Gauff are also playing. If Gauff wins her match, she might move up in the rankings. This article talks about exciting tennis matches and players working hard to win.

background_read: Tennis is a popular sport played around the world. Players compete in tournaments like the Miami Open to win titles and improve their rankings. Elena Rybakina is known for winning Wimbledon, a major tournament. Matches can be tough, and players need to stay focused, especially when they are behind. Aces and break points are important parts of tennis that can change the outcome of a game. The semi-finals are exciting because they decide who goes to the final round.
